description: Add a one-click button to launch Kiro IDE

variables.name: agent_id
variables.description: The ID of a Coder agent.

variables.name: folder
variables.description: The folder to open in Kiro IDE.

variables.name: mcp
variables.description: JSON-encoded string to configure MCP servers for Kiro. When set, writes ~/.kiro/settings/mcp.json.

variables.name: open_recent
variables.description: Open the most recent workspace or folder.
